set.body: Four scripts: benchmark-qr-backends.R, benchmark-qr-runtime.R, benchmark-qr-tsqr.R, benchmark-opencl-qr.R. Rehab per harness contract. Ops to expose: qr, qr_solve, tsqr (where applicable). All four currently have hard library() calls that crash cpu-only hosts <e2><80><94> must adopt the requireNamespace guard pattern from P0 amatrix-i26. Known ArrayFire 96x96 segfault in qr-backends must be guarded with a size-blocklist. Cross-backend numerical accuracy check required. Add baseline rows for every op/size/backend/variant the rehabbed scripts produce.
set.title: Rehabilitate QR benchmarks into harness (qr-backends, qr-runtime, qr-tsqr, opencl-qr)
